allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "--- cargo via Get-Command ---"; Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Write-Output "--- rustup via Get-Command ---"; Get-Command rustup -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; Write-Output "--- check %USERPROFILE%\\.cargo\\bin ---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin" | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output "not present" }; Write-Output "--- winget rust check ---"; winget list --id Rustlang.Rustup -e 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell($dest = "$env:TEMP\\rustup-init.exe"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://win.rustup.rs/x86_64" -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { Get-Item $dest | Select-Object FullName, Length })
PowerShell($dest = "$env:TEMP\\rustup-init.exe"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://win.rustup.rs/x86_64" -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; Get-Item $dest | Select-Object FullName, Length)

PowerShell($dest = "$env:TEMP\\rustup-init.exe"; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { $f = Get-Item $dest; Write-Output \("FullName: " + $f.FullName\); Write-Output \("Length:   " + $f.Length\) } else { Write-Output "MISSING" })

PowerShell($base = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\BuildTools"; Write-Output "--- BuildTools root ---"; if \(Test-Path $base\) { Get-ChildItem $base | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output "absent" }; Write-Output "--- VC dir ---"; if \(Test-Path "$base\\VC"\) { Get-ChildItem "$base\\VC" | Select-Object Name } else { Write-Output "no VC dir" }; Write-Output "--- Win Kits root ---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)" -Filter "Windows Kits" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;" + $env:Path; Write-Output "--- rustc ---"; rustc --version; Write-Output "--- cargo ---"; cargo --version; Write-Output "--- rustup ---"; rustup show)

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;" + $env:Path; $env:TMP = "C:\\workspace\\.cargo-tmp"; $env:TEMP = "C:\\workspace\\.cargo-tmp"; $env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR = "C:\\workspace\\.cargo-tmp\\hamm0r-target"; Set-Location "C:\\workspace\\hamm0r\\crates\\hamm0r"; cargo tauri dev 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath "C:\\workspace\\.cargo-tmp\\dev.log")
Bash(grep -E --line-buffered "error\\[|error:|warning: build failed|Finished |Running `|app started|listening on|panicked|os error|Tauri|Compiling hamm0r |cannot find")

PowerShell($user = "$env:USERDOMAIN\\$env:USERNAME"; Write-Output "Granting full control to: $user"; $cmd = "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\\Program Files\\hamm0r-build' -Force | Out-Null; icacls 'C:\\Program Files\\hamm0r-build' /grant '${user}:\(OI\)\(CI\)F' /T; Write-Host '[done]'; Start-Sleep 3"; Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList "-NoProfile","-Command",$cmd -Wait; Write-Output "--- post-elevation check ---"; Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\hamm0r-build"; "trytest" | Out-File "C:\\Program Files\\hamm0r-build\\test.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\hamm0r-build\\test.txt"\) { Write-Output "WRITE OK"; Remove-Item "C:\\Program Files\\hamm0r-build\\test.txt" } else { Write-Output "WRITE FAILED" })

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;" + $env:Path; $env:TMP = "C:\\Program Files\\hamm0r-build\\tmp"; $env:TEMP = "C:\\Program Files\\hamm0r-build\\tmp"; $env:CARGO_TARGET_DIR = "C:\\Program Files\\hamm0r-build\\target"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $env:TMP -Force | Out-Null; Set-Location "C:\\workspace\\hamm0r\\crates\\hamm0r"; cargo tauri dev 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath "C:\\Program Files\\hamm0r-build\\dev.log")
Bash(wsl -d kali-linux -- bash -c 'whoami; cat /etc/os-release | head -5; uname -a; echo "--- cargo? ---"; command -v cargo || echo "no cargo"; echo "--- WSLg? ---"; ls /mnt/wslg 2>&1 | head -3')
Bash(wsl -d kali-linux -- bash -c 'sudo -n true 2>&1 && echo "PASSWORDLESS-SUDO" || echo "NEEDS-PASSWORD"; cat /etc/sudoers.d/* 2>/dev/null | head -3')

Bash(wsl -d kali-linux -u root -- bash -c 'export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl wget git file build-essential pkg-config libssl-dev libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libgtk-3-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev libsoup-3.0-dev patchelf 2>&1 | tail -30')

Bash(wsl -d kali-linux -- bash -c 'curl --proto "=https" --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable --profile default 2>&1 | tail -20; source ~/.cargo/env; rustc --version; cargo --version')

Bash(wsl -d kali-linux -- bash -c 'set -e; cd ~; if [ -d hamm0r ]; then echo "EXISTS"; else git clone https://github.com/t0nigansel/hamm0r.git; fi; cd hamm0r; pwd; ls -d .git crates 2>&1; echo "--- WSLg env ---"; echo DISPLAY=$DISPLAY WAYLAND_DISPLAY=$WAYLAND_DISPLAY')

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin;$env:Path"; cargo clippy -p storage -p runner -p hamm0r --all-targets 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "secrets\\.rs|adapter\\.rs|error\\.rs")
